audit_answers.are_collapsed_affine_states_fully_audite: tracked proof-critical rows have exact-state fallback; full quotient equivalence classes are not proven
audit_answers.are_conflicts_impossible_by_definition_o: no conflicts in tracked transition table; impossibility for full equivalence requires external lemma
audit_answers.does_each_key_store_enough_state_to_dete: tracked keys have passing exported transition rows and exact-state fallback; full equivalence is not proven
audit_answers.what_fields_define_a_quotient_key: if c <= level: (s, q, o-BASE_O, c-BASE_C), where s=level-c and q=((a*residue+b)>>c) mod 2^s; otherwise needs-branch diagnostic key

missing_state_keys.reason: The tracked quotient transition table passes with exact-state fallback, but it does not prove that tracked keys represent full quotient equivalence classes.

plain_truth: This is the quotient abstraction validity gate. It does not claim the full proof is complete.

quotient_key_definition.key_formula: if c <= level: (s, q, o-BASE_O, c-BASE_C), where s=level-c and q=((a*residue+b)>>c) mod 2^s; otherwise needs-branch diagnostic key
proof_critical_state_needed: offset odd/even counts o-BASE_O and c-BASE_C
exact affine coefficients or representative state for B certification
successor key set for deterministic quotient merging

required_for_pass: Export per-key representative_count, successor_key_set, and conflict_count for every quotient key.
Keep quotient_exact_state_fallback_audit_report.json passing for every tracked proof-critical key.
Or provide a formal lemma proving the quotient key determines all proof-critical successors.
Keep sampled_as_proof_keys empty and conflicts zero.
